file_summary: This file implements time-sensitive signing and serialization functionality for the itsdangerous library. It defines two main classes: TimestampSigner, which extends basic signing with timestamp capabilities for expiration checking, and TimedSerializer, which provides serialization with built-in timestamp validation. The TimestampSigner adds and validates timestamps in signatures, while TimedSerializer handles serialization/deserialization of data with automatic timestamp checking through its loads method. The file includes methods for signing, unsigning with timestamp validation, checking expiration, and safe/unsafe loading of serialized data.

line_windows.summary: Imports and TimestampSigner class definition with sign method and unsign overloads.
Continuation of TimestampSigner.unsign method implementation with signature validation and timestamp parsing.
Timestamp validation, expiration checking, and TimedSerializer class definition with iter_unsigners method.
TimedSerializer.loads method implementation with error handling and loads_unsafe method.
